title: SimpleMemory
description: A plugin that optimize servers by offering a granular config file for end user to tinker with.
body:
# Notice
The progression of this project has been put on hold due to having loss some of the code files.
This project might have to go through an overhaul or will be deprecated. (until further notice)

# SimpleMemory
SimpleMemory is a plugin that offer sets of feature that aims to improve servers via optimization by utilizing features that it has to offer, along with its granular control over config file.

## Feature List:
- Inactive Chunk Unloader
- Entity Cap and Throttling
- Redstone Activity Limiter
- Scheduled Garbage Collection
- Async World Save
- Lag Spike Detector
- Dynamic View Distance Manager
- Smart Entity AI Limiter
- Chunk Loading Prioritizer
- And more
### Note:
> All of the feature could be disable/enable/configured via config file.
> 
> This plugin may be **incompatible** with other server plugin (mostly optimization plugins)

## Command Usage:
- /sm gc (Manually trigger garbage collection) 
- /sm stats (Show plugin statistics)
- /sm reload (Reload the plugin configuration)
- /sm advstats (Show plugin advance statistics)[2.5.4+]
> Command can only be used by server operator/owner
